sources.title: Granola raises $125M, hits $1.5B valuation as it expands from meeting notetaker to enterprise AI app
sources.key_claim: Granola Series C at $1.5B valuation; 250% QoQ revenue growth; enterprise APIs launched
sources.notes: Primary source for Granola Series C funding milestone and enterprise API product launch

sources.title: AI Notetaker Granola Hits $1.5 Billion Value in $125 Million Funding
sources.key_claim: Bloomberg confirmation of Granola $1.5B valuation; index Ventures led; Kleiner Perkins participated
sources.notes: Secondary confirmation of funding round details and investor names

sources.title: AI note-taking app Granola raises $43M at $250M valuation, launches collaborative features
sources.key_claim: Granola Series B at $250M valuation; Spaces and collaborative note-sharing features launched
sources.notes: Source for Series B milestone in the timeline; documents the $250M to $1.5B valuation trajectory

sources.title: Fireflies ignites a $1B valuation with real-time AI meeting assistant
sources.key_claim: Fireflies.ai reached $1B unicorn valuation via tender offer; profitable since 2023; no primary capital since 2021
sources.notes: Primary source for Fireflies unicorn milestone; confirms profitability and bootstrapped growth thesis

sources.title: AI Meeting Assistant Market Size, Share | CAGR at 34.7%
sources.key_claim: Global AI meeting assistant market at $4.31B in 2026; projected $72.17B by 2034 at 34.7% CAGR
sources.notes: Primary market sizing source; used for growth_1y (+37%), growth_5y (+363%), and trigger paragraph market figures

sources.title: AI Meeting Assistant Market Size & Share Report, 2026-2033
sources.key_claim: CAGR of 25.8% from 2026 to 2033; North America 33%+ market share; generative AI adoption as primary driver
sources.notes: Secondary market sizing corroboration; used for regional breakdown and CAGR range

sources.title: Zoom AI Companion Goes Cross-Platform with Microsoft Teams and Google Meet
sources.key_claim: Zoom AI Companion 3.0 expands to run inside Microsoft Teams and Google Meet; My Notes feature cross-platform
sources.notes: Source for December 2025 timeline milestone; documents Zoom's cross-platform strategy

sources.title: Granola vs Fathom vs Otter vs Fireflies: AI Notetaker Market Dynamics 2026
sources.key_claim: Granola mid-market spend reached ~$6K/month in February 2026 — 3x increase over prior 6 months; Fathom and Fireflies spend declining
sources.notes: Key source for competitor market share dynamics and spend growth data

sources.title: GDPR Compliant AI Meeting Assistants: What Enterprise Teams Need to Know in 2026
sources.key_claim: GDPR requirements for AI meeting tools: explicit consent, EU hosting, data deletion after transcription, BAAs for HIPAA-scope meetings
sources.notes: Source for Legal PESTAL section and enterprise compliance requirements in Takeaway 3

sources.title: AI-Powered Meeting Assistants Market Report 2026
sources.key_claim: Market at $3.14B in 2025, growing to $3.91B in 2026 at 24.6% CAGR (conservative estimate)
sources.notes: Secondary market sizing; used to validate 2025 baseline figure for 1Y growth calculation

sources.title: AI in Meeting Assistants Market Size to Hit USD 6.28 Billion by 2035
sources.key_claim: Market to reach $6.28B by 2035; North America dominant; generative AI and enterprise adoption main growth drivers

sources.title: Best AI Meeting Notetakers 2026: Tested (Bot-Free Picks)
sources.key_claim: Granola, Fathom, Otter.ai, Fireflies comparative review; bot-free architecture emerging as enterprise preference
sources.notes: Used to verify product differentiation claims in competitor section

unverified_claims.claim: Market share estimates for Microsoft Copilot, Zoom AI Companion, and Google Gemini (~25%, ~20%, ~18%)
unverified_claims.reason: No independent analyst has published official market share data for AI meeting intelligence by vendor; estimates are derived from user base size and strategic fit
No Keyword Everywhere or Google Trends export run; estimate based on category size and related term volumes

unverified_claims.claim: Knowledge workers average 4+ hours/day in meetings
unverified_claims.reason: Microsoft Work Trend Index 2025 cited but URL not directly retrieved in this research session; figure widely reported across industry sources
unverified_claims.flagged_as: [widely cited; verify against Microsoft Work Trend Index 2025]

research_notes: Topic selected after auditing 90+ existing hemle.blog trend data files to confirm 'ai-meeting-intelligence' not previously covered. Three competing topics evaluated (agentic AI in healthcare, AI predictive maintenance, AI BI analytics) before selecting AI Meeting Intelligence based on: (1) CAGR 34.7% qualifies as surging; (2) three fresh funding milestones in 2025-2026 (Granola Series B + C, Fireflies unicorn); (3) universal relevance across all knowledge worker segments; (4) active regulatory development creating PESTAL richness; (5) not on hemle.blog topic exclusion list.
